Description:


You are invited to respond with information to assist the Judicial Council in identifying available software solutions, implementation approaches, technical capabilities, and integration options that can support the Judicial Council¿s planned transition away from SAP Solution Manager.

Please visit the Courts Bidders/Solicitations web page to view the published Solicitation: 
https://www.courts.ca.gov 
All inquiries must be directed to Solicitations@jud.ca.gov
